name: Beef & Orange Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1 large lean ground beef, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, pepper, garlic cloves, orange rind, cumin, and chili powder in olive oil (and Pam if needed) until almost tender.
2. Add orange juice and stir until the liquid evaporates.
3. Add the cooked and drained ground beef and stir until the flavors have blended together.
4. Serve with heated flour tortillas and your choice of the following accompaniments: chopped tomatoes, shredded lettuce, grated sharp cheddar cheese, sour cream, chopped scallions, salsa, refried beans, tabasco sauce, or sliced jalapenos.
